_description: Shared golden vector for a QBTC bank.MsgSend SignDoc. Read via a plain readFileSync (not an import) by packages/core/mpc/tx/compile/compileTx.golden.test.ts (the hand-rolled protobuf encoder in packages/core/mpc/chains/cosmos/qbtc/QBTCTx.ts + QBTCHelper.ts, which bypasses WalletCore because MLDSA keys are secp256k1-incompatible) AND packages/sdk/tests/unit/platforms/react-native/qbtc-golden-vectors.test.ts (an independent cosmjs-types re-encode). Both assert the SAME expectedSignDocSha256Hex, so the two encoders cannot silently diverge. This is the SINGLE source of truth - do not duplicate these values as literals in either test file.
_pubKeyNote: MLDSA public key placeholder (0xaa * 32). The MLDSA PubKey proto is { key: bytes } at field 1 - identical wire shape to secp256k1 PubKey - only the Any typeUrl (/cosmos.crypto.mldsa.PubKey) differs, which is exactly what the two encoders must agree on.
